title: Werner Handy Stepstool 2 Step - Grey
features: Can be used as a stool or steps
Slim design takes up minimal storage space
Deep steps for maximum stability and comfort
description: The Werner Handy step is a convenient and practical way to accessing those just out of reach areas. With a top step of 0.45m, this 2 step grey steel-framed step stool features slip-resistant feet and folds flat for easy storage. Ideal for use light trade jobs and use around the home.
